name: Humpback Song
description: Oceanic song culture intelligence. Male humpback whales in a population sing the same song, which evolves collectively across a breeding season. New song variations originate in one ocean basin and propagate eastward across entire hemispheres over several years — a continent-scale cultural wave. Songs are hierarchically structured into units, phrases, themes, and complete arrangements, rivaling human musical grammar. One of the only non-human examples of culturally transmitted music at planetary scale.

core_attributes.pattern: global song propagation, hierarchical musical grammar, seasonal cultural evolution
